cast.name: 伊丽莎·斯科利迪 Eliza Skolidi

introduction: Tightly-wound and heart-wrenching, Act Like You're Asleep is the kind of brainteaser that both critics and audiences on ERT and ERTWORLD have gone crazy for. A highly intelligent piece of entertainment in the guise of a crime/mystery crowd pleaser, the plot is built with subversive twists and depth of feeling. Act Like You're Asleep is a mind-bending thriller that dives deep into the psyche and motivations of a teacher and his unwavering quest to seek justice for the murder of his wife and to protect his daughter and students.
